summary: Share link API: POST /api/share (create, bcrypt pw, nanoid-style 12-char id, Vercel Blob), GET /api/share (list), GET /api/share/[id] (public validate with rate limit + expiry), DELETE /api/share/[id] (owner-only revoke). Pure helper layer in _lib.ts; 35 unit tests, 107 total passing. Build clean. Pre-existing Sidebar RefObject TS error fixed as collateral.
